original_image_tags: A faded, aged paper document, appearing to be the back of a routing slip or form. It is oriented upside down relative to the viewer. There are two hole-punch tears at the top (original bottom). Faint, reversed text from the front side bled through the paper. Multiple date-time group stamps and distribution markings are visible in blue and black ink, some oriented correctly, some reversed.

elements.description: Back of a document page showing faint, reversed bleed-through text from the front side. The page contains multiple official stamps and handwritten annotations.
A vertical stamp reading 'RECEIVED BUREAU CHIEF INTELLIGENCE ROOM 9 30 AM'.
A stamp reading 'B I - DIRECTOR 11 00 AM 57'.
A stamp reading 'REC'D BELMONT FBI - JUSTICE NOV 13 6 36 PM 57'.
A stamp reading 'REC'D BELMONT FBI - JUSTICE NOV 14 12 46 PM 57'.
A vertical stamp reading 'L.R. 10A M 814 - C5'.
A stamp reading 'CIVIL AERONAUTICS BOARD 8 L.R.'
A stamp reading 'U.S. GOVT. PROPERTY' over 'PASSED FOR MAILING' over 'FBI - Justice'.
A stamp reading 'RECEIVED BUREAU CHIEF INTELLIGENCE ROOM 14 PM 57'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the page being the back of a document with bleed-through text and multiple stamps, with no contradictions on the specific stamp text that B lists.
